evidence.gapCheck: legacy runtime placeholder ABIs removed from lib/abis

summary.notes: Frontend runtime ABI placeholders were removed from lib/abis. Remaining special-case ABIs are managed through parity overrides/exemptions and are not empty placeholder registry files.

risks: ABI parity can still fail when frontend ABI fragments drift from compiled artifacts.
Synthetic/helper ABI exceptions must remain intentional and documented.
controls: No runtime placeholder ABI files remain in lib/abis.
ABI parity checks enforce artifact alignment during validation.
Any future placeholder introduction requires explicit signoff update.
